title: Create src/hooks/useAutoUpdater.ts renderer hook with typed state machine
description: Create renderer hook. Subscribes to window.app.update.onStatus (added in subtask 05), exposes state machine + actions. See '## Components / 2. src/hooks/useAutoUpdater.ts' in context.md for the exact UpdateStatus discriminated union shape.
acceptance_criteria: Exports a named hook useAutoUpdater() and a named type UpdateStatus (discriminated union exactly as specified in context.md)
Returns { status: UpdateStatus, currentVersion: string, check: () => Promise<void>, download: () => Promise<void>, install: () => Promise<void> }
On mount: fetches currentVersion via window.app.update.getVersion() and subscribes to window.app.update.onStatus
Returns an unsubscribe cleanup from useEffect
Uses useState/useEffect/useCallback only (no extra deps); does not import 'electron-updater' or 'electron'
All actions delegate to window.app.update.* (no direct ipcRenderer access)
tsc -p tsconfig.app.json (or root tsconfig) succeeds with no 'any' types in public surface
completion_summary: Created src/hooks/useAutoUpdater.ts (105 lines): named exports useAutoUpdater + UpdateStatus + payloadToStatus + UseAutoUpdaterReturn. Subscribes via window.app.update.onStatus, loads version via getCurrentVersion, action wrappers swallow errors (surfaced via update:status). ISO->Date conversion isolated in pure helper. useState/useEffect/useCallback only; no electron-updater import in renderer.
